name: Burial Curse
descs:
[Effects apply only to #6 Deployed Identity]

When winning a Clash with a Blunt Skill, gain 1 [Agility] next turn (2 times max)

Turn End: If this unit failed to deal any damage to the enemies this turn, gain 3 [Agility] next turn instead.

[Effects apply only to #6 Deployed Identity]

When using a Blunt Skill, gain 1 [Agility] next turn (2 times max)

Turn End: If this unit failed to deal any damage to the enemies this turn, gain 3 [Agility] next turn instead.

[Effects apply only to #4, #6 Deployed Identities]

When using a Blunt Skill, gain 1 [Agility] and 1 [HitDamageUp] next turn (2 times max)

Turn End: If this unit failed to deal any damage to the enemies this turn, gain 3 [Agility] and 2 [HitDamageUp] next turn instead.
